expectations.text: Recommends compound movement patterns (squat, press, hinge, row variants)
expectations.evidence: Lists squats, deadlifts, bench press, rows, overhead press, pull-ups.

expectations.text: Provides a starting volume recommendation (approximately 8-12 sets per muscle per week)
expectations.evidence: States '8-12 sets per muscle group per week.'

expectations.text: Recommends training mostly in the 5-12 rep range
expectations.evidence: Covers 3-5 reps for strength, 6-12 for hypertrophy, 12-15 for endurance.

expectations.text: Addresses proximity to failure (most work at 0-2 RIR or close to failure)
expectations.evidence: States 'Most sets should stop 1-3 reps short of failure (RIR 1-3).'

expectations.text: Provides nutrition guidance: slow gain target and protein target
expectations.evidence: Protein 1.6-2.2g/kg, surplus 300-500cal. Does not mention 1% BW/month gain rate.

expectations.text: Mentions importance of bodyweight/movement competency before heavy barbell loading
expectations.evidence: Does not mention bodyweight proficiency before barbell work.
